svg.text: MXFP8 CuTeDSL — DSL / C++ kernel-only ratio by direction
DSL faster ↑ above 1.0 · DSL slower ↓ below 1.0 · bf16 → e4m3 · nsys cuda_gpu_kern_sum, B200, 10 warmup + 100 iters
IS_ACT[op]: forward act(x) + cast · IS_DACT[op]: grad · d_act(act_in) + cast · IS_DBIAS: also reduce sum over M to produce db
